text.title: Continuous Delivery Basics Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Each release pulls 3 engineers off feature work for a week of manual testing.
antipattern.root-cause: Mainline not deployable; tests not automated.
antipattern.fix: Invest in automated tests + flag-protected new behavior so manual testing is exception, not norm.

antipattern.symptom: Deploy commit drops a column AND deploys code that no longer reads it; rollback impossible.
antipattern.fix: Split into two deploys with backfill between.

antipattern.symptom: Bug appears in prod that staging cannot reproduce; nobody knows why.
antipattern.root-cause: Staging and prod configured manually; configuration drifted.
antipattern.fix: Codify both in Terraform/Pulumi; bring staging back to parity.
